The '''Rell system''' had at least six [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Its sixth planet was the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Rellnas]], whose single [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Rellnas Minor]], was home to the [[Rellarin]] people.

==Behind the scenes==
The Rell system was first listed in [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] as the "Rellnas Minor system" until being modified as the "Rellnas system" in the latest version released in October, [[2012]].
